title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 512.010 - Writs of error in civil cases abolished — review by appeal
text:
512.010.  Writs of error in civil cases abolished — review by appeal. — 1.  Writs of error are abolished in civil cases. Review shall be by appeal, which shall constitute a continuation of the proceeding in the trial court and be deemed to present all issues which heretofore have been presented by writ of error and appeal.
  2.  This section is not intended to apply to criminal cases.
(L. 1943 p. 353 § 125)
